extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO caught GRELLIER inside final 100 meters after Directe Énergie rider led 144km breakaway to base of Jebel Akhdar climb
tactical_patterns: Directe Énergie placed two riders in early break to force peloton work, nearly stealing summit finish despite numeric disadvantage
LUTSENKO conserved energy with Astana controlling pace, timed final acceleration to catch dying breakaway inside 100m rather than chasing earlier
Tailwind and crosswind sections enabled prolific early pace, creating uncertainty about chase timing that favored breakaway longevity

rider_signals.GRELLIER Fabien: positive: survived 144km breakaway and held lead until final 100m on Green Mountain, showing exceptional diesel endurance
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: third stage win and red jersey demonstrates superior tactical patience, only committing when GRELLIER cracked at line
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: neutral: tried to close gap in final kilometer but lacked acceleration to bridge to leaders
